commit.subject: LU-17638 revert: "LU-9680 lnet: add NLM_F_DUMP_FILTERED support"
commit.message:
LU-17638 revert: "LU-9680 lnet: add NLM_F_DUMP_FILTERED support"

This reverts commit d3ef8f699343db2578996a3f45625cc2daf603fa.
This is causing sanity-lnet to fail immediately with:

    Failed to export global yaml 139

Change-Id: I3bc17a59a86c46623afc07fa2a008ce8ba56d74e
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-lnet,sanity-lnet,sanity-lnet
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-lnet,sanity-lnet,sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
